design_philosophy: Handcrafted, editorial layout. High-end Apple-style product pages. Generous whitespace, massive typography, smooth scrolling, human-centred storytelling.

rules: Strictly NO purple/teal gradients on white as primary backgrounds.
Accents must be used sparingly (gradient blobs, underlines, highlights, Three.js mesh).
Body and heading text must be near-black (#0A0A0B) to maintain contrast.

scale.overline: text-xs sm:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-gray-500

rules: Use tight letter spacing for headings.
Never center-align paragraphs; prioritize left alignment for readability.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.

sections_blueprint.name: Navigation
sections_blueprint.description: Glassmorphism sticky header. Very clean. Logo left, navigation + Apply Now right.
sections_blueprint.style: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-gray-100 z-50 sticky top-0

sections_blueprint.name: Hero
sections_blueprint.description: Massive editorial typography left. Interactive Three.js 3D blob right.
sections_blueprint.interactions: Three.js mesh material (MeshDistortMaterial) morphing on hover, colored with Teal, Pink, Purple gradient.

sections_blueprint.name: CiPD Story
sections_blueprint.description: Idea -> Research -> Development -> Real-world Impact. Full-bleed sections pinned to screen during scroll.
sections_blueprint.layout: Sticky pinning / Framer Motion scroll progress. One phase fading into another.

sections_blueprint.name: Featured Video
sections_blueprint.description: YouTube shorts embedded in a vertical 9:16 cinematic frame. Surrounded by massive whitespace.
sections_blueprint.layout: Flex center. Video container has soft shadow, rounded corners. No excessive text.

sections_blueprint.name: Featured Projects
sections_blueprint.description: One project visible at a time. Horizontal scroll mapping to vertical scroll.
sections_blueprint.layout: Sticky container, Framer Motion useScroll hook transforming x axis.

sections_blueprint.name: Events
sections_blueprint.description: Premium timeline. Not generic cards. Minimalist nodes with large typography dates and crisp imagery.
sections_blueprint.layout: Vertical line with alternating left/right minimalist content blocks.

sections_blueprint.name: Student Experience
sections_blueprint.description: Large photography showcasing human-centered stories, workshops, hardware labs.
sections_blueprint.layout: Asymmetric Bento or Masonry grid. Generous gap.

sections_blueprint.name: Share Your Ideas
sections_blueprint.description: Signature large CTA section. Form is frontend only. Highly memorable. Subtle blob blur background.
sections_blueprint.layout: Centered massive heading. Minimalist form fields with bottom borders only (no boxes).

interactions.animations: Framer Motion for scroll-triggered fade-ups and scale-ins. DO NOT overuse bouncy animations. Keep them clean and professional (ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1]).
interactions.three_js: Use @react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei. Implement a MeshDistortMaterial sphere or custom organic shape that responds to mouse movement.

anti_patterns: NO dark backgrounds for primary sections.
NO purple/teal heavy gradients on backgrounds.
